priceUpdate: SOL is -1.8% in the last 24h and +1.2% over the last 7 days, while sentiment is still extreme fear. That keeps the setup tradable, but not stable yet. 24h volume is about $3.57B, which shows active trading. The key question is whether buyers keep rotating into Solana instead of back into BTC and ETH. Near-term direction depends on whether DEX/perps liquidity headlines turn into real usage (wallets, swaps, borrowing), led by CoinDesk 20 performance update.
pastWeek: SOL finished the week up 1.1%. The most discussed driver was CoinDesk 20 performance update (CoinDesk), because it points to where new liquidity may concentrate.
thisWeek: The lead setup this week is CoinDesk 20 performance update, with traders now reacting to specific Solana headlines. Next up is Jito jumps 11% as new Solana market layer fuels demand. These stories only matter if they drive measurable usage, borrowing, and trading depth. Watch wallet growth, swaps, and perps depth around DEX/perps liquidity first.
whatsHot: What's hot: ai agents, new products are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
